description_long: This is a stylized child figure with a youthful appearance, featuring a round face, large ears, and short, tousled hair. The child is dressed in a fitted, long-sleeve shirt with horizontal stripes and a pair of straight-cut pants. The figure's arms are slightly extended outward, and the hands are relaxed with fingers naturally splayed. The child wears sturdy shoes and has a small pouch or accessory attached to the right side of the waistband. The proportions and details suggest a playful, animated character suitable for urban environments. The overall design is clean, with smooth surfaces and simplified anatomical features.
description: A stylized child figure in a striped long-sleeve shirt, pants, and sturdy shoes, with short tousled hair and a small pouch at the waist.
description_view_0: Front view shows the child's face, striped shirt, extended arms, and relaxed hands.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the ear, and the straight posture of the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, shirt, pants, and the pouch on the waistband.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and arm position.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve knit shirt and straight-cut pants with a waist accessory
attribute_hairstyle: short, tousled hair with a slightly spiky texture
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly extended
